It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Jouyella. The plant's classification places it within the angiosperms, a group of seed-producing plants. Jouyella fimbriata is further classified under the division Magnoliophyta, which includes all flowering plants. It is also classified as a dicotyledon, a plant that has two cotyledons or seed leaves during germination.
